footer.info: Iwon Naildisplay creates smart magnetic display systems designed to elevate nail color presentation in modern salons.

header.title: Professional
header.subtitle: Showcase your shades with clarity and elegance. Our smart display system helps you present, organize, and sell more effectively.

products.title: The Best Way to
products.subtitle: A modular nail display system designed for both everyday use and professional salons-helping to organize, showcase, and simplify color selection with ease.
products.displaySub: Present nail colors clearly and professionally

choice.title: Designed for
choice.subtitle: Place the removable sample nail directly on your finger to see how the color or design will look in real life. This simple testing method makes it easier to compare shades and confidently choose the perfect one.

options.title: Three Display Options. One Smart System.
options.subtitle: Select the configuration that fits your needs-a storage cabinet for full organization or a versatile frame for flexible presentation.
options.frameSub: A minimal display solution with stand or wall-mount option.
options.cabinetSub: Integrated storage and display in one elegant unit.
options.displaySub: A minimal display solution with stand or wall-mount option.

organization.title: Smart Color Organization
organization.subtitle: A clear numbering system connects each sample nail with its matching polish bottle, helping quickly locate, organize and present every color with ease.

upgrade.title: Upgrade Your Salon Display Today
upgrade.subtitle: Discover a smarter, cleaner and more elegant way to present colors, designed for both everyday users and nail professionals.

products.title: Build Your Perfect Display Setup
products.subtitle: Discover all components of the Iwon Nail Display system designed to organize, present and elevate your nail color collection.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our products, ordering process and how the system works.

privacy.title: Legal Notice
privacy.subtitle: Information according to § 5 TMG
privacy.generalOne: The following information provides an overview of how your personal data is collected and processed when you visit our website. Personal data is any data that can be used to personally identify you. The responsible entity for data processing on this website is:
privacy.dataOne: How do we collect your data?
privacy.dataOneSub: Your data is collected when you provide it to us, for example by placing an order or filling out a contact or checkout form. Other data is collected automatically when you visit our website through IT systems. This includes technical data such as your browser type, operating system, or time of access.
privacy.dataTwo: What do we use your data for?
dataTwoList: ensure the proper functioning of the website
improve our services and user experience
privacy.legalSub: Your data is processed in accordance with GDPR based on:
legalSubList: Article 6(1)(b) – processing necessary for contract performance (orders)
privacy.dataSharingSub: We only share your data when necessary, for example with:
privacy.dataSharingUnderlist: All third parties are obligated to comply with data protection regulations.
privacy.cookiesUnder: Our website uses cookies to ensure proper functionality and improve user experience. Some cookies are essential, while others help us analyze user behavior. You can control or disable cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.retentionSub: We retain your personal data only as long as necessary to fulfill contractual and legal obligations. After that, the data is deleted unless further storage is required by law.
privacy.rightsUnderlist: You can contact us at any time regarding your data.
privacy.securitySub: We take appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data. However, data transmission over the Internet (e.g. email) may have security vulnerabilities.
privacy.disclaimerSub: The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes only. We make no guarantees regarding the completeness accuracy, or timeliness of the content. Our website may contain links to external third-party websites. We have no control over their content and accept no liability for it. The respective provider is responsible for the content of linked pages. If you become aware of any legal violations on our website, please inform us. We will remove such content immediately.
